project_context.name: TechnoKick 2026
project_context.theme: Light Mode with Retro-Football Poster Vibe
project_context.archetype: Hybrid of Swiss High-Contrast & Organic Earthy (Retro Sports Edition)
project_context.description: In-house engagement web app for Technopark employees during FIFA World Cup 2026.

primary.name: Brick Red
primary.usage: Primary CTAs, live indicators, key highlights

surface.name: Pure White
surface.usage: Card backgrounds inside the cream canvas

rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl+ uppercase tracking-normal leading-none font-heading

surfaces_and_shadows.ticket_stub: bg-white border-2 border-foreground shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#0A0A0A] relative before:content-[''] before:absolute before:w-6 before:h-6 before:bg-[#F7F5F0] before:border-r-2 before:border-foreground before:rounded-full before:-left-3 before:top-1/2 before:-translate-y-1/2
surfaces_and_shadows.texture_overlay: Apply a subtle SVG noise filter or halftone pattern image over large colored surfaces to achieve the vintage poster feel.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white font-heading text-xl md:text-2xl uppercase px-6 py-3 border-2 border-foreground shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#0A0A0A] transition-all active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-foreground font-heading text-xl md:text-2xl uppercase px-6 py-3 border-2 border-foreground shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#0A0A0A] transition-all active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none

inputs.text: bg-white border-2 border-foreground shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A] px-4 py-3 font-body focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:border-primary rounded-none transition-all
inputs.radio: appearance-none w-5 h-5 border-2 border-foreground rounded-full checked:bg-primary checked:ring-2 checked:ring-foreground checked:ring-offset-2

badges.default: inline-block bg-accent text-white font-bold text-xs uppercase px-3 py-1 border-2 border-foreground transform -rotate-2 shadow-[2px_2px_0px_#0A0A0A]

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Asymmetrical balance, dynamic diagonals, sticker/badge overlaps.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Hard snappy translations, no soft fading. Elements pop out.
motion_and_interactions.submit_action: A visual 'stamp' or 'seal' slamming down on the page (scale down from 3x size to 1x, slight rotation, fast spring physics).
motion_and_interactions.celebration: Confetti overlay using primary and secondary colors on prediction win or correct answer.

home_screen.layout: Grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-8 with overlapping 'sticker' elements.
home_screen.features: Two massive 'Ticket' cards for PS5 and Predictions. Scoreboard segment font for countdowns. A live tracking banner scrolling at the top (marquee).

ps5_tournament.layout: 1970s geometric bracket. High contrast lines connecting matches.
ps5_tournament.features: Match cards resemble matchday tickets. '🔴 LIVE NOW' blinking badge. Company points table styled like an old newspaper standings section.

daily_prediction.layout: Vertical feed of match cards in the center.
daily_prediction.features: Questions styled as a betting slip. Yes/No radio buttons look like punch-holes. Score predictions use large bold inputs.

user_dashboard.layout: Profile header styled as a credential badge/lanyard card.
user_dashboard.features: Prediction history displayed as a retro receipt. Badges (e.g., Giant Slayer) shown as embroidered patch graphics.

admin_panel.layout: Sidebar navigation in Accent Teal, cream main area.
admin_panel.features: Use custom Shadcn components but strip the soft shadows and rounded corners; replace with solid 2px borders and sharp corners.

icons.style: bold or duotone to match heavy ink lines

images.description: Stadium at sunset - apply a heavy halftone filter and duotone (Brick Red/Teal) via CSS mix-blend-mode.
Vibrant stadium crowd - use for the 'Player of the Match' section background with Mustard Yellow overlay.
Close up vintage leather soccer ball - mask out background and use as a floating decorative element (sticker).
Textured paper - apply globally as a fixed background with opacity 0.1 and mix-blend-multiply.

testing_attributes.instructions: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Examples: data-testid='login-button', data-testid='prediction-submit-button', data-testid='ps5-register-form'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use standard soft shadows (shadow-md). ONLY use the custom hard shadows (shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A])
Do NOT use the Inter or Roboto fonts. Add Google Fonts Anton, Chivo, and Space Mono to index.html.
Implement the 'Ticket Cutout' using CSS pseudo-elements (before/after circles with background matching the canvas color).
Use raw Tailwind and HTML for public pages. Only use Shadcn (heavily styled to match the brutalist/retro look) for the Admin Dashboard and complex modals.
Mobile-first implementation is strictly required. Stacking on mobile should retain the heavy borders and ticket styles.
Use react-fast-marquee for the Announcements feed to give a retro news-ticker vibe.
